scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "gateway,auth,user,diet,workout,feed,store,chat" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,red,white,gray" "npm run dev --prefix gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/user-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/diet-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/workout-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/feed-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/store-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/chat-service"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "gateway,auth,user,diet,workout,feed,store,chat" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,red,white,gray" "npm start --prefix gateway" "npm start --prefix services/auth-service" "npm start --prefix services/user-service" "npm start --prefix services/diet-service" "npm start --prefix services/workout-service" "npm start --prefix services/feed-service" "npm start --prefix services/store-service" "npm start --prefix services/chat-service"
